'''nachubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecidium|cecidium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecidium|cecidium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nachubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næchibith|næchibith]] || [[word:næchibij|næchibij]] || [[word:næchibish|næchibish]] || [[word:næchibi|næchibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nachuchubuth|nachuchubuth]] || [[word:nachuchubuj|nachuchubuj]] || [[word:nachuchubush|nachuchubush]] || [[word:nachuchubu|nachuchubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nachubuth|nachubuth]] || [[word:nachubuj|nachubuj]] || [[word:nachubush|nachubush]] || [[word:nachubu|nachubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nachufbuth|nachufbuth]] || [[word:nachufbuj|nachufbuj]] || [[word:nachufbush|nachufbush]] || [[word:nachufbuf|nachufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nachubuthu|nachubuthu]] || [[word:nachubuju|nachubuju]] || [[word:nachubushu|nachubushu]] || [[word:nachubuku|nachubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nachubuth|nachubuth]] || [[word:nachubuj|nachubuj]] || [[word:nachubush|nachubush]] || [[word:nachubu|nachubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nachubuthul|nachubuthul]] || [[word:nachubujul|nachubujul]] || [[word:nachubushul|nachubushul]] || [[word:nachubukul|nachubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nachubuthuthu|nachubuthuthu]] || [[word:nachubujuju|nachubujuju]] || [[word:nachubushushu|nachubushushu]] || [[word:nachubuku|nachubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nachubuthun|nachubuthun]] || [[word:nachubujun|nachubujun]] || [[word:nachubushun|nachubushun]] || [[word:nachubukun|nachubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nachubuthuoro|nachubuthuoro]] || [[word:nachubujuoro|nachubujuoro]] || [[word:nachubushuoro|nachubushuoro]] || [[word:nachubukuoro|nachubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
